spec.name: MindRend
spec.summary: A reality-altering effect that releases mind energy in a column volume by changing existing conditions
spec.effect_description: Invokes a fundamental disruption to local Flux architecture. The caster inscribes a sigil that releases mind energy in a column volume by changing existing conditions. Effect range: long. Persistence: permanent. Side effects on caster and casting site are documented but not fully understood.
spec.notes: Pale-class spell - use with extreme caution

all_grimoire_row: | **MindRend** | Circle | Emit | Affect | T5 | Mind | Raw | Cylinder | Long | Permanent | Filter |
